transcript:
Welcome to Ranger, DeFi's Command Center! Rangers! Thanks for reporting in to Solana Breakpoint, here in beautiful Abu Dhabi! In the next few minutes, FA2 will walk you through new integrations. Like our yield token RGUSD, The Vault Commanders joining the ranks, and how you now own a piece of Ranger. Even the camels have gathered for this one, they're very bullish creatures! Strap in, stay sharp. And remember, always ask where the yield comes from!

GM GM everyone. All right, GM everyone. I'm FA2 from Ranger. And for the past year, Ranger has been building DeFi's Command Center. What that means in practice is simple. One place to trade across all your favorite platforms. Instead of juggling between tabs, guessing where the liquidity is, and overpaying in slippage and fees. Today, Ranger is plugged into the venues everyone here loves on Solana. Drift, Jupiter, Flash, and most recently, Hyperliquid. But we really can't call ourselves DeFi's Command Center if we stop here. Our goal is to give traders the best possible execution. Lowest slippage, lowest fee, and the least price impact. And to do that better, we need more venues. Which is why we're going back to our Solana's DeFi roots for our next two integrations. Pacifica and Bulk. Through Pacifica, users will earn extra Pacifica points when routing through Ranger. But we know more markets and incentives are never enough. Hence, we're taking it a step further. It's not enough to show you where to trade. We also need to help you put your capital to work. Today, I'm really excited to unveil Ranger USD. Our yield-bearing token. If you're sitting in stables instead of chasing yield, you can just hold one token and let Ranger do the work. Under the hood, there are two parts. A base layer that spreads deposit across lending markets on Solana. And a boosted layer that runs delta-neutral funding rate strategies. In the last 30 days, Ranger USD has outperformed the next best lending pool by 30%. And we're able to offer this because of our recent acquisition of Voltr. Who've been building vault infrastructure the past three years. We've plugged that tech into Ranger and now we're using the same setup not just for Ranger USD but a whole lineup of future vault managers. Recently, we've onboarded Vectis Finance and Prime Number as new vault managers on Ranger. Bringing institutional-grade strategies to everyone. It really has been quite a year for Ranger with a Hyperliquid integration, Titan integration, and Ranger USD amongst many other things. The last piece of the puzzle is who gets to own the DeFi Command Center. I'm really excited to share that we're ready to launch the Ranger token. And when we do, we want to do it right. And for us, the right place to do it is on MetaDAO. Futarchy. We're raising a min... we're raising a minimum of 6 mil through MetaDAO. The biggest minimum raise on MetaDAO yet. 40% of it will be supplied for the ICO and 12% for liquidity. For the team, it is cliffed for 18 months together with a performance-based unlock that kicks in when Ranger trades at 2x multiples from the ICO price. And I know a lot of you have been asking, wen token and wen Ranger. Right now, we're waiting for MetaDAO audits to sign off on everything. Because Ranger's ICO is more interesting than a standard sale. Firstly, we're giving point holders guaranteed allocation instead of a big day one airdrop. An airdrop might still happen, and more details on the airdrop proposal will be shared post-ICO. Secondly, MetaDAO is introducing a new buy wall mechanism designed to support the post-ICO market structure. So, why should anyone care about getting into this sale? MetaDAO has quietly built one of the cleanest launch tracks... cleanest launch tracks records this cycle. Recently, featured launches like Solomon, Avici, and Umbra have all traded up from their initial sale prices. In some cases way up. Ranger is next in that lineup. Ranger is live. Ranger routes real volume. Ranger has users, revenue, and now a token model that's designed to... Combine traders who route through Ranger, vault managers who build on Ranger, and the community that's been backing us from the start. We're here to make Ranger the Command Center you want to own. Own Ranger, own the Command Center, own DeFi. More details on the ICO will be revealed soon, and if you want to know more about the sale, our vaults, and how you can be part of Ranger, drop us a message and let's chat. My name is FA2, thank you everyone for listening.

*Second AAA-Rated RV/Marine Securitization Reflects Strong Market Demand and Doubles Inaugural Issuance*
NEW YORK,Dec. 2, 2025/PRNewswire/ --[Octane](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4569709-1&h=3934843120&u=http://www.octane.co/&a=Octane)®(Octane Lending, Inc.®), thefintechrevolutionizing the buying experience for major recreational purchases, announced that it has closed a $219 million securitization ("OCTL 2025-RVM1") collateralized by its fixed-rate installment recreational vehicle and marine loans issued through its in-house lender,[Roadrunner Financial](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4569709-1&h=2175505459&u=https://www.roadrunnerfinancial.com/&a=Roadrunner+Financial)®, Inc.
This is Octane's second transaction under its RV/Marine shelf, denoted with the "RVM" ticker. Its first,[OCTL 2024-RVM1](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4569709-1&h=2093806513&u=https://octane.co/o/completes-126-million-asset-backed-securitization-octl-2024-rvm1/&a=OCTL+2024-RVM1), was named as the[ABS Deal of the Year](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4569709-1&h=3699712550&u=https://www.globalcapital.com/securitization/article/2esv5exn7soqsxbbvery8/securitization/securitization-polls-and-awards/globalcapital-us-securitization-awards-2025-winners-announced&a=ABS+Deal+of+the+Year)at the GlobalCapital US Securitization Awards 2025. The 2024 transaction represented the first securitization composed solely of RV and marine collateral to be brought to market in two decades. Since launching its securitization program in December 2019, Octane has completed 16 asset-backed securitizations totaling over $4.7 billion.
OCTL 2025-RVM1 consists of five classes of fixed-rate notes: Class A, Class B, Class C, Class D, and Class E, which Standard && Poor's (S&&P)\* rated as AAA, AA, A, BBB, and BB+ respectively, in a private offering pursuant to Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended. ATLAS SP Securities acted as lead manager and structuring agent, with J.P. Morgan Securities, Mizuho, and Truist Securities serving as joint bookrunners and First Citizens Capital Securities serving as co-manager.
"The successful execution of our second RVM securitization reflects the growing maturity of our RVM platform and the market's recognition of RV and marine as a compelling, high-quality asset class," said Nicholas Makarov, SVP and Head of Capital Markets at Octane. "We've seen investor interest deepen meaningfully as we've broadened our presence in these segments, and we're grateful for that continued support. As the program scales, the depth of demand across the capital structure reflects continued confidence in our performance, our underwriting, and our ability to grow responsibly."
Octane has continued to build significant momentum in both its business and its Capital Markets program. The Company has more than doubled its RV originations each year since entering[the market in 2022](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4569709-1&h=2573580097&u=https://octane.co/o/entering-the-rv-market-to-streamline-and-digitize-the-buying-experience/&a=the+market+in+2022)and is on track to more than double RV origination

# Figure Technology Solutions Reports Third Quarter 2025 Results
November 13, 2025 16:10 ET| Source:[Figure Technology Solutions, Inc.](https://www.globenewswire.com/en/search/organization/FT%20Intermediate%CE%B4%20Inc%C2%A7)FollowFigure Technology Solutions, Inc.
Share
* * * * * * * * NEW YORK, Nov. 13, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Figure Technology Solutions (Nasdaq: FIGR), the leading blockchain-native capital marketplace for the origination, funding, sale and trading of tokenized assets, today announced financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2025.
“We recently completed our successful initial public offering and are pleased to report a strong first quarter as a public company. The continued success of Figure’s marketplace approach to tokenized consumer loan origination drove significant growth in earnings, with Net Income increasing 227% year-over-year while also achieving an Adjusted EBITDA margin of 55%, underscoring the scalability of our blockchain-based model. Alongside margin expansion, we delivered solid performance across our key metrics, consumer loan marketplace volume, Adjusted Net Revenue, and growth across our blockchain ecosystem pillars, positioning Figure to finish 2025 with continued momentum.”
- Michael Tannenbaum, CEO
**Q3 2025 Financial Highlights**
* Consumer Loan Marketplace volume was $2.5 billion in the quarter, a 70% increase from the prior year. This included Figure Connect volume of $1.1 billion, up from $767 million in the second quarter. The Figure Connect platform was launched in June 2024.
* Net Revenue increased 55% year-over-year. Adjusted Net Revenue was $156 million, up 42% from third quarter 2024.
* Net Income increased 227% year-over-year to $90 million.
* Adjusted EBITDA increased 75% year-over-year to $86 million; Adjusted EBITDA margin reached 55%, up 10 percentage points year-over-year.
* The company completed its initial public offering of its shares on September 12, 2025, issuing 36 million shares, including 28 million primary shares, for net proceeds of $663 million.
**Q3 2025 Financial Highlights**

tags.impact_reason: Ranger Finance's launch of a yield-bearing token (RGUSD), integrations with multiple Solana DeFi platforms, and plans for a token launch on MetaDAO represent a significant expansion of its DeFi aggregator service.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a 'DeFi Vault Core' as the Semantic Anchor because the transcript repeatedly uses terms like 'Command Center,' 'Vault Commanders,' and discusses a new 'Asset Layer' (RGUSD). This anchor physically represents the security, aggregation of capital, and complex yield infrastructure Ranger is building. The layered, mechanical design of the vault visually mirrors the 'base' and 'boosted' layers of the RGUSD token. For the portrait, I integrated the diegetic text '+30%' glowing on a component, directly referencing the key performance metric from the transcript ('outperformed the next best lending pool by 30%'), turning the artwork into a direct narrative of success.
visual_idea.description: A low-angle, dramatic shot of a massive, circular DeFi vault door, functioning as the central core of a futuristic command center. The door is made of interlocking brushed aluminum and polished obsidian rings, with intricate glowing blue and gold circuits running between them. One of the central, translucent acrylic rings has the text '+30%' glowing from within, like a live performance metric. The background is a cavernous, dark room with server racks and holographic data streams receding into deep, soft-focus depth, creating a sense of immense scale and complexity.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, low-angle, dramatic vertical shot (3:4 aspect ratio), emphasizing immense height and epic scale, with significant negative space above the central subject. At the core is a massive, circular DeFi vault door, functioning as the central engine core of a futuristic command center. It is meticulously crafted from interlocking brushed aluminum rings, showcasing precise machining details and subtle reflections, juxtaposed with deeply reflective polished obsidian rings that absorb and reflect ambient light, creating a high-contrast visual. Intricate glowing blue and gold circuits run seamlessly between these rings, pulsating with energy. One of the central, translucent acrylic rings visibly displays the text '+30%', glowing vibrantly from within its material, akin to a dynamic, live performance metric. The vault door stands within a cavernous, dark room, filled with dramatic, cinematic volumetric lighting that catches dust motes and creates visible light shafts. Server racks stretch into the deep background, receding into a soft-focus depth, accompanied by ethereal holographic data streams that further emphasize the immense scale and complexity of the environment. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, high dynamic range, cinematic volumetric lighting.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a 'DeFi Vault Core' as the Semantic Anchor because the transcript repeatedly uses terms like 'Command Center,' 'Vault Commanders,' and discusses a new 'Asset Layer' (RGUSD). This anchor physically represents the security, aggregation of capital, and complex yield infrastructure Ranger is building. The layered, mechanical design of the vault visually mirrors the 'base' and 'boosted' layers of the RGUSD token. For the portrait, I integrated the diegetic text '+30%' glowing on a component, directly referencing the key performance metric from the transcript ('outperformed the next best lending pool by 30%'), turning the artwork into a direct narrative of success.
visual_idea.description: A tight macro shot focusing on the intricate mechanism of the DeFi vault core. The frame is filled with the intersection of a brushed aluminum gear and a polished obsidian ring. A thin, recessed channel of glowing blue light separates the two materials, highlighting the precision engineering. The focus is on the textures, the play of light on metal, and the feeling of immense, latent power within the machine. NO TEXT.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A tight macro shot focusing on the intricate mechanism of a DeFi vault core, composed for a perfect square (1:1) aspect ratio with central focus. The frame is entirely filled with the intersection of a textured brushed aluminum gear and a highly reflective, polished obsidian ring. A thin, recessed channel of vibrant, glowing blue volumetric light sharply separates the two materials, casting subtle blue reflections and illuminating the absolute precision engineering. Emphasize the contrasting textures of the matte brushed aluminum and the slick, mirror-like polished obsidian. Highlight the dramatic play of light on both metal and dark, reflective stone, creating deep shadows and bright specular highlights. The scene exudes a feeling of immense, latent power contained within the complex machine. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, cinematic lighting, studio quality.

editorial.headline: Ranger Finance Pivots to Asset Layer with Voltr Acquisition and Record $6M MetaDAO Raise
editorial.standfirst: Solana's premier aggregator moves beyond simple execution by vertically integrating yield infrastructure and launching a 'Futarchy' based token. The strategic pivot aims to capture value through a new yield-bearing stablecoin, RGUSD.
key_takeaways: Strategic Acquisition: Ranger has acquired **Voltr** to power **Ranger USD (RGUSD)**, a yield-bearing stablecoin blending lending yields with delta-neutral funding strategies.
Record Futarchy Raise: The protocol will conduct a **$6M ICO on MetaDAO**, the platform's largest raise to date, featuring a novel 'buy wall' mechanism and 18-month team cliffs.
Execution Expansion: New integrations with **Pacifica** and **Bulk** enhance the 'Command Center' router, offering traders exclusive point incentives and deeper liquidity access.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
Aggregators in DeFi have historically suffered from a 'mercenary' problem: they provide the best execution but struggle to capture value from transient volume. **Ranger Finance** is closing this loop by vertically integrating. With the acquisition of **Voltr** and the launch of **Ranger USD (RGUSD)**, the protocol is transitioning from a passive routing layer to an active asset manager. By controlling both the execution flow and the underlying capital, Ranger can now internalize the spread and funding rate yields that previously leaked to external lending protocols.

The technical backbone of this pivot is the **Voltr** infrastructure, which powers the new RGUSD token. Unlike standard stablecoin wrappers, RGUSD operates as a structured product: it combines a base layer of lending deposits with a 'boosted' layer executing delta-neutral funding rate strategies. FA2’s data indicates this approach has outperformed comparable lending pools by 30% over the last month. The addition of institutional vault managers like **Vectis Finance** and **Prime Number** further signals Ranger's intent to become the middleware for sophisticated, automated on-chain yield strategies on Solana.

On the capital formation front, Ranger is rejecting the low-float, high-FDV private round model in favor of market-driven governance. The decision to launch via **MetaDAO**—targeting a minimum raise of $6M—is a significant endorsement of the 'Futarchy' model. By utilizing prediction markets for governance and implementing a post-ICO 'buy wall,' Ranger is aligning its tokenomics with long-term protocol health. For institutional allocators, the strict 18-month team cliff and performance-based unlocks (triggering only at 2x ICO price) offer a refreshing degree of alignment in a market often criticized for misaligned insider incentives.
